title: StudyGuide
description: One-page study guide for a single unit

core_concepts.description: Sharp, precise bullet points. Inline math uses $...$ KaTeX delimiters.

definition.description: One line max. Inline math uses $...$ KaTeX delimiters (e.g. 'The limit $\lim_{x \to c} f(x)$').

katex_string.description: Valid KaTeX string — rendered in displayMode block. Verified by Checker before integration.

data.description: For table: {headers: string[], rows: string[][]}. For chart: Chart.js ChartConfiguration.

exam_tip.description: One sentence on what College Board emphasizes from this unit. Inline math uses $...$ KaTeX delimiters.
